name: Vivid Tail
desc: Target 1 card you control; return it to the hand. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 face-up card you control; Set this card (but banish it when it leaves the field), and if you do, return that face-up card to the hand, but for the rest of this turn, you cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with the same name that card had once it returned to the hand. You can only use 1 "Vivid Tail" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Target 1 card you control; return it to the hand. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 face-up card you control; Set this card (but banish it when it leaves the field), and if you do, return that face-up card to the hand, but for the rest of this turn, you cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with the same name that card had once it returned to the hand. You can only use 1 "Vivid Tail" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
